title: Principal Plant Manager at Kia India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Kia India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Kia India Holdings Services in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India Holdings Services:
Kia India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
